title: The Heartforge
author: guardian@vaultmesh.org
summary: The great forge at the heart of Forgehold.

world.description: The Heartforge burns at the centre of Forgehold Citadel — where Soulsteel is made. (Its Trial Chamber is a separate, unreleased dungeon.)

public_projection.title: The Heartforge
public_projection.summary: The great forge at the heart of Forgehold.
